𝔸1.0.tictactoe-spec@2026-02-27
γ≔game-theory

⟦Ω:Meta⟧{
  sender≜@spec-agent
  receiver≜@consumer-agent
  intent≜inform
  id≜"ttt-spec-001"
  timestamp≜1740614400
  protocol≜1
}

⟦Σ:Types⟧{
  Player≜{X, O}
  Cell≜{X, O, ∅}
  Row≜[Cell, Cell, Cell]
  Board≜[Row, Row, Row]
  Pos≜{r:ℕ, c:ℕ | r∈{0,1,2} ∧ c∈{0,1,2}}
  GameStatus≜{ongoing, win(Player), draw}
  State≜{board:Board, turn:Player, status:GameStatus}

  Lines≜{
    rows    : {(0,0),(0,1),(0,2)} | {(1,0),(1,1),(1,2)} | {(2,0),(2,1),(2,2)},
    cols    : {(0,0),(1,0),(2,0)} | {(0,1),(1,1),(2,1)} | {(0,2),(1,2),(2,2)},
    diags   : {(0,0),(1,1),(2,2)} | {(0,2),(1,1),(2,0)}
  }
}

⟦Γ:Rules⟧{
  ∀p∈Pos : cell(board, p) ∈ Cell
  ∀p∈Pos : cell(board, p) = ∅ ⇒ validMove(board, p)
  ∀p∈Pos : cell(board, p) ≠ ∅ ⇒ ¬validMove(board, p)

  status(s) = ongoing ⇒ validMove(s.board, p) ∧ p∈Pos
  status(s) ≠ ongoing ⇒ ¬∃p∈Pos : validMove(s.board, p)

  ∃L∈Lines : (∀p∈L : cell(board, p) = X) ⇒ winner(board) = X
  ∃L∈Lines : (∀p∈L : cell(board, p) = O) ⇒ winner(board) = O
  ¬∃L∈Lines : (∀p∈L : cell(board, p) = X) ∧
  ¬∃L∈Lines : (∀p∈L : cell(board, p) = O) ∧
  ¬∃p∈Pos  : cell(board, p) = ∅             ⇒ draw(board)

  s.turn = X ⇒ nextTurn(s) = O
  s.turn = O ⇒ nextTurn(s) = X

  ∀s∈State : countMark(s.board, X) - countMark(s.board, O) ∈ {0, 1}
}

⟦Λ:Funcs⟧{
  cell≜λ(board, pos).board[pos.r][pos.c]

  validMove≜λ(board, pos).
    pos.r ∈ {0,1,2} ∧
    pos.c ∈ {0,1,2} ∧
    cell(board, pos) = ∅

  lineWon≜λ(board, L, p).
    ∀pos∈L : cell(board, pos) = p

  hasWon≜λ(board, p).
    ∃L∈Lines : lineWon(board, L, p)

  boardFull≜λ(board).
    ¬∃pos∈Pos : cell(board, pos) = ∅

  checkStatus≜λ(board).
    hasWon(board, X) → win(X)
  | hasWon(board, O) → win(O)
  | boardFull(board) → draw
  | otherwise        → ongoing

  applyMove≜λ(state, pos).
    validMove(state.board, pos) ∧ state.status = ongoing →
      State{
        board  : state.board[pos.r][pos.c] ← state.turn,
        turn   : nextTurn(state),
        status : checkStatus(state.board[pos.r][pos.c] ← state.turn)
      }
    | ¬validMove(state.board, pos) → state

  isGameOver≜λ(state).
    state.status ≠ ongoing

  initState≜λ().
    State{
      board  : [[∅,∅,∅],[∅,∅,∅],[∅,∅,∅]],
      turn   : X,
      status : ongoing
    }
}

⟦Ε⟧⟨δ≜0.82;φ≜100;τ≜◊⁺⁺⟩

𝔸1.0.tic-tac-toe-spec@2026-02-27
γ≔game-spec

⟦Ω:Meta⟧{
  sender≜@agent-codex
  receiver≜@agent-orchestrator
  intent≜inform
  id≜"msg-tictactoe-spec-001"
  timestamp≜1772150400
  reply_to≜"user-task-ttt-001"
  protocol≜1
}

⟦Σ:Types⟧{
  Player≜{X,O}
  Cell≜{E,X,O}
  Index≜{0,1,2}
  Board≜Index×Index→Cell
  Move≜{r:Index,c:Index,p:Player}
}

⟦Γ:Rules⟧{
  ∀b:Board
  ∀m:Move
  ∀p:Player
  ∀i:Index
  ∀j:Index

  b(m.r,m.c)=E⇒valid(b,m)
  b(m.r,m.c)≠E⇒¬valid(b,m)
  valid(b,m)⇒apply(b,m)(m.r,m.c)=m.p
  valid(b,m)⇒((i≠m.r∨j≠m.c)⇒apply(b,m)(i,j)=b(i,j))

  (∃r∈Index:b(r,0)=p∧b(r,1)=p∧b(r,2)=p)⇒wins(b,p)
  (∃c∈Index:b(0,c)=p∧b(1,c)=p∧b(2,c)=p)⇒wins(b,p)
  (b(0,0)=p∧b(1,1)=p∧b(2,2)=p)⇒wins(b,p)
  (b(0,2)=p∧b(1,1)=p∧b(2,0)=p)⇒wins(b,p)

  (wins(b,X)∨wins(b,O)∨(∀i∈Index∀j∈Index:b(i,j)≠E))⇒terminal(b)
}

⟦Λ:Funcs⟧{
  lineWin≜λ(a,b,c,p).(a=p∧b=p∧c=p)
  winsF≜λ(B,p).((∃r∈Index:lineWin(B(r,0),B(r,1),B(r,2),p))∨(∃c∈Index:lineWin(B(0,c),B(1,c),B(2,c),p))∨lineWin(B(0,0),B(1,1),B(2,2),p)∨lineWin(B(0,2),B(1,1),B(2,0),p))
  boardFull≜λ(B).∀i∈Index∀j∈Index:B(i,j)≠E
  gameOver≜λ(B).winsF(B,X)∨winsF(B,O)∨boardFull(B)
}

⟦Ε⟧⟨δ≜0.92;φ≜100;τ≜◊⁺⁺⟩

[id:"spec-sched-1", %%:1]
INF(@spec>@reader): #TaskSchedulerSpec{
  version: "1.0",
  types: [
    #Task{
      id: string,
      priority: 1..5,
      deadline: timestamp,
      status: #unassigned | #assigned | #complete,
      assigned_to: string | _
    },
    #Worker{
      id: string,
      available: boolean,
      current_task: string | _
    },
    #Assignment{
      task_id: string,
      worker_id: string,
      assigned_at: timestamp
    }
  ],
  invariants: {
    priority_bounds: forall($t: Task, $t.priority >= 1 & $t.priority <= 5),
    single_task_per_worker: forall($w: Worker, forall($a1: Assignment, forall($a2: Assignment,
      ($a1.worker_id = $w.id & $a2.worker_id = $w.id) -> $a1.task_id = $a2.task_id))),
    assignment_consistency: forall($t: Task,
      ($t.status = #assigned) -> ($t.assigned_to != _)),
    unassigned_has_no_worker: forall($t: Task,
      ($t.status = #unassigned) -> ($t.assigned_to = _)),
    worker_availability: forall($w: Worker,
      ($w.current_task != _) -> ($w.available = F))
  },
  rules: {
    priority_order: forall($t1: Task, forall($t2: Task,
      ($t1.priority > $t2.priority) -> assign($t1) -> assign($t2))),
    deadline_tiebreak: forall($t1: Task, forall($t2: Task,
      ($t1.priority = $t2.priority & $t1.deadline < $t2.deadline) -> assign($t1) -> assign($t2))),
    no_overassign: forall($w: Worker,
      ($w.available = F) -> !assign(_, $w)),
    respect_deadline: forall($t: Task,
      ($t.deadline < now()) -> ($t.status != #unassigned))
  },
  functions: {
    next_task: next_task($tasks: [Task]) ->
      filter($tasks, $t: $t.status = #unassigned)
      -> sort_by($t: [-$t.priority, $t.deadline])
      -> head()
      -> if($result != _, $result, #error{msg:"no unassigned tasks"}),
    assign_task: assign_task($task: Task, $worker: Worker) ->
      if(
        $worker.available = T & $task.status = #unassigned,
        set($task.status, #assigned)
        -> set($task.assigned_to, $worker.id)
        -> set($worker.available, F)
        -> set($worker.current_task, $task.id)
        -> #Assignment{task_id: $task.id, worker_id: $worker.id, assigned_at: now()},
        #error{msg:"worker unavailable or task already assigned"}
      ),
    release_worker: release_worker($worker: Worker) ->
      set($worker.current_task, _)
      -> set($worker.available, T),
    complete_task: complete_task($task: Task, $worker: Worker) ->
      set($task.status, #complete)
      -> release_worker($worker)
  }
}
